ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES geographic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Additional context or notes for the year */,
  "is_census_year" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is a census year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county in that year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic level */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county in that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_geographic_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_level_id") REFERENCES geographic_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the census */,
  "census_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county in that census year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic level */,
  "census_density" REAL /* Population density of the county in that census year */,
  "census_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population covered by the census */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_geographic_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_level_id") REFERENCES geographic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year of the survey */,
  "survey_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county in that survey year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic level */,
  "survey_density" REAL /* Population density of the county in that survey year */,
  "survey_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population covered by the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_geographic_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_level_id") REFERENCES geographic_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "record_year" INTEGER /* Year of the administrative record */,
  "record_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county in that administrative record year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic level */,
  "record_density" REAL /* Population density of the county in that administrative record year */,
  "record_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population covered by the administrative records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_records_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_records_geographic_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_level_id") REFERENCES geographic_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_records_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for analyst, 3 for researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic level */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_geographic_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_level_id") REFERENCES geographic_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., census, survey, administrative records) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source, if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_source_type FOREIGN KEY ("source_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., population, demographic) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic level (e.g., county, state, national) */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the geographic level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report type */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the report */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL where the report can be accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)
